content.en:
Ye Tian was not too worried about his son's safety.

After all, Ye Xingchen is a primary-level powerhouse of the Eternal Realm God Realm who has condensed a perfect-level Eternal Realm Spirit, and his strength is very strong, and among the Eternal Realm God Realm currently stationed in the entire Eternal Realm Realm, there are only a handful of people who have the strength to threaten him.

As long as Ye Xingchen doesn't die, he will hardly encounter much danger.

So, he was very relieved.

......

"I have already condensed two Eternal Realm Spirits, and then I have to continue to improve the Eternal Dao Species, and after I reach the limit, I will condense the third Eternal Realm Spirit, the Tianyan Red Dragon Realm Spirit!" Ye Tian planned.

He was ready to cultivate honestly and not get involved in anything.

However, on this day, the Eternal Realm was still in trouble.

Eternal Border, near the Alliance of the Firmament Mountain Realm, the Red Blood Demon Abyss.

The Red Blood Demon Abyss is a very dangerous place, but there are also a lot of internal resources, many of which can help the Eternal Realm God Realm ascend.

Therefore, the Qiongshan Realm Alliance has given birth to a number of Eternal Realm God Realms, and there have been more than ten Eternal Realm God Realms guarding here for a long time.

It can be said that the Firmament Mountain Realm Alliance is also a large Eternal Realm Alliance.

But on this day, something happened to the Red Blood Demon Abyss 693.

Deep in the Abyss of Red Blood.

The void cracked, and one after another figures appeared, and they were all demon seeds, their aura was very powerful, and they were all demon seeds of the Eternal Realm God Realm.

A large number of Eternal Realm God Realm Demon Seeds appeared, but they all converged inside the Red Blood Demon Abyss and did not leave.

Finally, an even more terrifying demon seed appeared.

The other Eternal Realm Divine Realm Demon Seeds bowed down one after another, "Lord Chi Xun!"

Chi Xun is a demon seed comparable to condensing the six Eternal Realm Spirits and Eternal Realm God Realm mid-level peak powerhouses.

Even in the real Demon Seed Abyss, he is famous.

"First destroy the Firmament Mountain Realm Alliance, and then destroy as many Eternal Realms as possible, this time our Demon Seed Abyss is going to invade the Realm God Realm, and the Eternal Realm naturally can't let it go, and destroy as much as you can. Demon Seed Akatsumi ordered.

"Yes, Akatsumi-sama!"

Many Eternal Realm Divine Realm Demon Seeds answered.

......

Alliance of the Dome Realms.

It's still very calm here, all the ancient cities are very harmonious, only a few places have small frictions, and the Eternal Realm God Realm here (cgbj) is also cultivating silently, and they don't know what is happening inside the Red Blood Demon Abyss.

After all, they couldn't have imagined that the real Demon Seed Abyss had actually opened up the passage with the Red Blood Demon Abyss and used this place as an invasion channel.

If they knew, they would have fled quickly, not daring to stay here!

Suddenly.

The aura of endless demon seeds permeated the air, covering one eternal realm after another.

"It's not good, it's the demon seed!!!!"

A Eternal Realm God Realm powerhouse appeared, revealing a frightened look.

From these demon seed breaths, they felt the breath of the Eternal Realm God Realm Demon Seeds, and their strength was extremely terrifying, and many of them surpassed their demon seed existences.

In the face of such a crisis, they are not opponents at all.

So, the first thought that came to their mind was to escape.

Swish!!!!!

They fled quickly.

However.

In the void, a big hand instantly crossed over and grabbed one Eternal Realm God Realm one by one.

This big hand is not the arm of the Eternal Realm God Realm, but the arm of the Demon Seed, and it is also the hand of the Eternal Realm God Realm mid-level peak demon seed.

Suddenly, they despaired.

"Thirteen Eternal Realm God Realms, very good, I won't kill you, you still have to become demon seeds!"

Chi Xun urged the breath of the Eternal Dao Seed, constantly trying to transform these Eternal Realm Divine Realm demons into demons.

However.

These Eternal Realm Divine Realms are also very aware of the consequences of demonization, and it is completely a loss of their will, which is equivalent to death.

And so.

Rumble!!!!!

One Eternal Realm God Realm blew up the Eternal Dao Seed and died, but there were still three Eternal Realm God Realms who did not choose to commit suicide, but were willing to become demon seeds.

"Only three Eternal Realm God Realms have become demon seeds, it's a pity!"

Demon Seed Akatsumi shook his head.

If these guys all become demon seeds, then the demon seed side will have thirteen more Eternal Realm God Realm combat power.

"Destroy this Eternal Kingdom Alliance, kill all living beings, they are not qualified to become demon seeds!"

Demon Seed Akatsumi said.

"Yes!"

A group of Eternal Realm Divine Realm Demon Seeds answered.

Next.

The Qiongshan Kingdom Alliance suffered, and one after another the eternal kingdoms collapsed, and countless living beings were wiped out in an instant.

......

Eternal borders, divisions of the Realm.

Naturally, this place knew about the invasion of the demon seed, and suddenly everyone's faces changed drastically.

"Damn, the Demon Seed Abyss has invaded the Eternal Realm, and we must fight back!"

The Realm immediately sent many of the Realm members back, and then banded together to stop those demon seeds.

Other than that.

The Boundary Division also asked for support from the Realm God Realm, but the reply received was to deal with it on its own, because the Realm God Realm had also been invaded by the Demon Seed Abyss, and that was the real battlefield of slaughter, and the Eternal Realm was just a small fight.

Endless Realms Alliance.

Ye Tian also received the summons from the Boundary Court Branch, and immediately frowned.

"Demon Seed Abyss Invasion, this is a bit of trouble!"

He immediately informed his son to come back, otherwise he would not have survived if he encountered the demon seed army.

After Ye Xingchen received the news, he immediately returned.

And Ye Tian sent a duplicate body to the Boundary Court Branch, it was definitely not possible to fight alone, this time he still had to join forces with other members of the Boundary Court to solve the crisis this time.

......

Boundary Division.

Ye Tian came here and happened to participate in the meeting.

Presiding over this meeting was the strongest person in the Realm Division, a powerhouse in the middle level of the Eternal Realm God Realm who had condensed the six Eternal Realm Spirits, the God of the Underworld Realm!

The god of the underworld took out a piece of black brand, and every Eternal Realm God Realm had one: "Everyone, this is the Void Card, a treasure condensed from the top Eternal Realm Treasure Void Ancient Bell, it can allow you to shuttle to any place in an instant in the Eternal Realm, of course, a Void Card can only be used ten times, so don't use it indiscriminately if it is not a critical moment." And there's a time between using it, so don't expect it to help you escape from the Seed. I'm giving you the cards to escape, just for support, not to escape!"

Ye Tian took this empty card, looked at it a few times and put it away.
